title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
summary: OpenAI工程师通过大规模核心转储分析，定位并修复了一个持续18年的基础设施bug，涉及硬件故障和软件缺陷。
analysis_note: 展示了AI基础设施调试的深度实践，技术价值高，但非模型或框架突破。
